norwegian: Forskningsresultatene ___ på at tidlig intervensjon gir bedre resultater.
english: The research results suggest that early intervention gives better results.

norwegian: Det kan argumenteres for at utdanningssystemet trenger reformer.
english: It can be argued that the education system needs reforms.

norwegian: Studien ___ at sammenhengen mellom søvn og produktivitet er signifikant.
english: The study shows that the connection between sleep and productivity is significant.

norwegian: I lys av nyere forskning bør man revurdere tidligere antakelser.
english: In light of recent research, one should reconsider earlier assumptions.

norwegian: Dataene indikerer en tydelig trend mot økt digitalisering i helsesektoren.
english: The data indicates a clear trend toward increased digitalization in the health sector.

norwegian: Denne ___ bidrar til å fylle et kunnskapshull innen feltet.
english: This study contributes to filling a knowledge gap within the field.

norwegian: Som flere forskere har påpekt, er problemstillingen mer kompleks enn antatt.
english: As several researchers have pointed out, the issue is more complex than assumed.

norwegian: Det er verdt å merke seg at resultatene kun gjelder for denne aldersgruppen.
english: It is worth noting that the results only apply to this age group.

norwegian: Videre forskning er nødvendig for å bekrefte disse funnene.
english: Further research is necessary to confirm these findings.

norwegian: ___ konklusjon kan vi si at hypotesen er delvis bekreftet.
english: In conclusion, we can say that the hypothesis is partially confirmed.

norwegian: Kunne De være så vennlig å sende meg referansene?
english: Could you be so kind as to send me the references?

norwegian: Hei! Kan du ___ meg notatene fra forelesningen?
english: Hi! Can you send me the notes from the lecture?

norwegian: Vi tillater oss å informere Dem om endringene i avtalen.
english: We take the liberty of informing you about the changes in the agreement.

norwegian: Slapp av, det ordner seg sikkert!
english: Relax, it will surely work out!

norwegian: Herr direktør, jeg ___ gjerne diskutere budsjettet med Dem.
english: Mr. Director, I would like to discuss the budget with you.

norwegian: Jeg lurer på om du har lyst til å henge i kveld?
english: I'm wondering if you feel like hanging out tonight?

norwegian: Det hadde vært hyggelig om De kunne delta på arrangementet.
english: It would be nice if you could attend the event.

norwegian: Hva skjer, kompis? Lenge ___ !
english: What's up, buddy? Long time no see!

norwegian: Undertegnede bekrefter herved mottak av Deres henvendelse.
english: The undersigned hereby confirms receipt of your inquiry.

norwegian: Takk for sist! Det var skikkelig gøy på festen din.
english: Thanks for last time! Your party was really fun.

norwegian: Bygningen ble ___ på 1800-tallet og har blitt restaurert flere ganger.
english: The building was built in the 1800s and has been restored several times.

norwegian: Det sies at nordmenn er verdens lykkeligste folk.
english: It is said that Norwegians are the world's happiest people.

norwegian: Døren er lukket, men vinduene står ___ .
english: The door is closed, but the windows are open.

norwegian: Beslutningen ble tatt uten at de ansatte ble konsultert.
english: The decision was made without the employees being consulted.

norwegian: Varene ___ levert innen tre virkedager.
english: The goods will be delivered within three business days.

norwegian: Boken anses som et viktig bidrag til norsk litteratur.
english: The book is considered an important contribution to Norwegian literature.

norwegian: Forslaget ble forkastet av et overveldende flertall.
english: The proposal was rejected by an overwhelming majority.

norwegian: Veien er ___ på grunn av veiarbeid.
english: The road is closed due to road work.

norwegian: Det ble bestemt at møtet skulle utsettes til neste uke.
english: It was decided that the meeting would be postponed to next week.

norwegian: Rapporten ble skrevet av en ekstern konsulent.
english: The report was written by an external consultant.

norwegian: Selv om økonomien vokser, ___ arbeidsledigheten fortsatt høy.
english: Even though the economy is growing, unemployment remains high.

norwegian: Til tross for at regjeringen lovet endringer, har lite skjedd.
english: Despite the government promising changes, little has happened.

norwegian: Riktignok har prisen steget, men kvaliteten har også blitt bedre.
english: Admittedly the price has risen, but the quality has also improved.

norwegian: Derimot viser tallene fra Sverige en helt ___ utvikling.
english: By contrast, the figures from Sweden show an entirely different development.

norwegian: Imidlertid bør vi ikke overse de langsiktige konsekvensene.
english: However, we should not overlook the long-term consequences.

norwegian: Det er ___ sant at vi trenger flere barnehageplasser.
english: It is undeniably true that we need more kindergarten places.

norwegian: Likevel kan man stille spørsmål ved metodene som ble brukt.
english: Nevertheless, one can question the methods that were used.

norwegian: På den ene siden er tiltaket nødvendig, på den andre siden er det kostbart.
english: On the one hand the measure is necessary, on the other hand it is costly.

norwegian: Ikke desto ___ har prosjektet oppnådd bemerkelsesverdige resultater.
english: Nonetheless, the project has achieved remarkable results.

norwegian: Selv om vi tar hensyn til usikkerheten, er trenden klar.
english: Even if we take the uncertainty into account, the trend is clear.

norwegian: Hele prosjektet gikk i ___ etter at finansieringen ble kuttet.
english: The whole project fell apart after the funding was cut.

norwegian: Hun tok bladet fra munnen og sa nøyaktig hva hun mente.
english: She spoke her mind and said exactly what she thought.

norwegian: Det er ikke bare ___ å flytte til et nytt land.
english: It's not easy at all to move to a new country.

norwegian: Han slo to fluer i en smekk ved å kombinere trening og transport.
english: He killed two birds with one stone by combining exercise and transport.

norwegian: Vi må ___ i det sure eplet og akseptere budsjettkuttene.
english: We must bite the bullet and accept the budget cuts.

norwegian: Det var dråpen som fikk begeret til å flyte over.
english: That was the straw that broke the camel's back.

norwegian: Hun har alltid et ess i ___ når forhandlingene blir vanskelige.
english: She always has an ace up her sleeve when negotiations get difficult.

norwegian: Man skal ikke rope ulv uten grunn.
english: One shouldn't cry wolf without reason.

norwegian: Etter mange forsøk fikk han endelig has på problemet.
english: After many attempts he finally got the better of the problem.

norwegian: Vi sitter alle i ___ båt og må samarbeide.
english: We're all in the same boat and must cooperate.

norwegian: Sjelden har jeg sett en så vakker solnedgang over fjorden.
english: Rarely have I seen such a beautiful sunset over the fjord.

norwegian: Det var ___ som fant løsningen på problemet.
english: It was she who found the solution to the problem.

norwegian: Aldri før hadde byen opplevd en slik storm.
english: Never before had the city experienced such a storm.

norwegian: Først da han leste brevet, forsto han alvoret i situasjonen.
english: Only when he read the letter did he understand the gravity of the situation.

norwegian: Det er denne ___ vi bør satse på i fremtiden.
english: It is this strategy we should invest in for the future.

norwegian: Ikke bare regnet det, men det blåste også kraftig.
english: Not only was it raining, but it was also blowing hard.

norwegian: Langs kysten ___ man de vakreste fiskerlandsbyene.
english: Along the coast one finds the most beautiful fishing villages.

norwegian: Lite visste de om hva som ventet dem bak fjellet.
english: Little did they know about what awaited them behind the mountain.

norwegian: Det er nettopp dette poenget mange overser.
english: This is precisely the point that many overlook.

norwegian: Bare med ___ innsats kan vi nå målet.
english: Only with a joint effort can we reach the goal.

norwegian: Hun sa at hun ___ vært i Norge i over ti år.
english: She said that she had been in Norway for over ten years.

norwegian: De fortalte at de ville flytte til Bergen neste år.
english: They said they would move to Bergen next year.

norwegian: Legen ___ at pasienten måtte hvile i minst to uker.
english: The doctor said that the patient had to rest for at least two weeks.

norwegian: Han hevdet at han aldri hadde hørt om avtalen.
english: He claimed that he had never heard about the agreement.

norwegian: Avisen rapporterte at prisene ___ stige ytterligere neste kvartal.
english: The newspaper reported that prices would rise further next quarter.

norwegian: Hun innrømmet at hun ikke hadde forberedt seg godt nok.
english: She admitted that she had not prepared herself well enough.

norwegian: Vitnet forklarte at han ___ sett en mørk bil utenfor huset.
english: The witness explained that he had seen a dark car outside the house.

norwegian: Statsministeren lovet at regjeringen ville prioritere klimatiltak.
english: The prime minister promised that the government would prioritize climate measures.

norwegian: De påsto at de hadde levert rapporten i tide.
english: They claimed that they had delivered the report on time.

norwegian: Naboen ___ at han skulle flytte til Tromsø om noen måneder.
english: The neighbour mentioned that he would move to Tromsø in a few months.

norwegian: Om bare jeg ___ visst det tidligere, ville alt vært annerledes.
english: If only I had known it earlier, everything would have been different.

norwegian: Hvis jeg var deg, ville jeg takket ja til tilbudet.
english: If I were you, I would accept the offer.

norwegian: Det ville vært fint om vi ___ møtes oftere.
english: It would be nice if we could meet more often.

norwegian: Hadde jeg hatt mer tid, ville jeg ha reist til Lofoten.
english: Had I had more time, I would have traveled to Lofoten.

norwegian: Jeg skulle ___ at hun hadde mer erfaring med prosjektledelse.
english: I would wish that she had more experience with project management.

norwegian: Om vi hadde investert tidligere, ville vi vært bedre stilt nå.
english: If we had invested earlier, we would be better off now.

norwegian: Tenk om alle ___ norsk — verden ville vært et bedre sted!
english: Imagine if everyone spoke Norwegian — the world would be a better place!

norwegian: Det er som om vinteren aldri ville ta slutt i år.
english: It is as if winter would never end this year.

norwegian: Skulle det ___ seg at vi tar feil, beklager vi på forhånd.
english: Should it turn out that we are wrong, we apologize in advance.

norwegian: Dersom jeg hadde råd, ville jeg kjøpt en hytte ved sjøen.
english: If I could afford it, I would buy a cabin by the sea.

norwegian: Som nevnt ___ , har dette vært et gjennomgående problem.
english: As mentioned earlier, this has been a recurring problem.

norwegian: Av denne grunn har kommunen besluttet å iverksette nye tiltak.
english: For this reason, the municipality has decided to implement new measures.

norwegian: Den ___ utviklingen har ført til bekymring blant fagfolk.
english: The aforementioned development has led to concern among professionals.

norwegian: I forlengelsen av dette bør man også vurdere alternative løsninger.
english: As an extension of this, one should also consider alternative solutions.

norwegian: Det ___ sagt er det viktig å se det hele i en større sammenheng.
english: That said, it is important to see the whole thing in a larger context.

norwegian: Følgelig må vi tilpasse strategien til de nye omstendighetene.
english: Consequently, we must adapt the strategy to the new circumstances.

norwegian: Oppsummert kan vi si at resultatene ___ lovende.
english: In summary, we can say that the results are promising.

norwegian: I tillegg til det ovennevnte bør vi ta hensyn til lokale forhold.
english: In addition to the above, we should take local conditions into account.

norwegian: Med andre ord har prosjektet ikke nådd de opprinnelige målene.
english: In other words, the project has not reached its original goals.

norwegian: Avslutningsvis vil jeg ___ at samarbeidet har vært svært verdifullt.
english: In closing, I want to emphasize that the collaboration has been very valuable.

norwegian: Den ___ sangen fylte hele konsertlokalet med glede.
english: The singing song filled the entire concert venue with joy.

norwegian: Et velskrevet brev kan åpne mange dører i arbeidslivet.
english: A well-written letter can open many doors in working life.

norwegian: De ___ barna lekte i parken mens foreldrene snakket sammen.
english: The laughing children played in the park while the parents talked together.

norwegian: Sittende ved vinduet kunne hun se hele fjorden.
english: Sitting by the window, she could see the entire fjord.

norwegian: Det ___ dokumentet inneholdt viktige opplysninger om saken.
english: The enclosed document contained important information about the case.

norwegian: Gående langs stien oppdaget de en gammel steinhytte.
english: Walking along the path, they discovered an old stone cabin.

norwegian: Den ___ maten ble servert med lokale grønnsaker.
english: The grilled food was served with local vegetables.

norwegian: Kjørende i full fart klarte han å unngå ulykken.
english: Driving at full speed, he managed to avoid the accident.

norwegian: De nylig ansatte medarbeiderne fikk en grundig opplæring.
english: The newly hired employees received thorough training.

norwegian: Med ___ armene sto han og ventet på bussen.
english: With folded arms, he stood waiting for the bus.

norwegian: Hvem ville vel trodd at en liten bygd kunne produsere en verdensmester?
english: Who would have thought that a small village could produce a world champion?

norwegian: Resultatet — som mange hadde ___ — ble en stor skuffelse.
english: The result — as many had feared — was a great disappointment.

norwegian: Tre ord: kvalitet, innovasjon og bærekraft.
english: Three words: quality, innovation, and sustainability.

norwegian: Er det virkelig ___ vi vil at samfunnet vårt skal se ut?
english: Is this really what we want our society to look like?

norwegian: Naturen. Stillheten. Friheten. Norge har alt.
english: Nature. Silence. Freedom. Norway has everything.

norwegian: Det er — og dette er viktig å understreke — ingen garanti for suksess.
english: There is — and this is important to emphasize — no guarantee of success.

norwegian: Og ___ ? Vel, det er opp til deg å bestemme.
english: And then? Well, it's up to you to decide.

norwegian: La meg gjøre det helt klart: dette er ikke akseptabelt.
english: Let me make it perfectly clear: this is not acceptable.

norwegian: Problemet er ikke pengene. Problemet er ___ .
english: The problem is not the money. The problem is time.

norwegian: Hun lo — ikke fordi det var morsomt, men fordi hun var nervøs.
english: She laughed — not because it was funny, but because she was nervous.

norwegian: Viser til samtalen vår og ___ herved bekreftelse på avtalen.
english: Referring to our conversation, I hereby attach confirmation of the agreement.

norwegian: Vedlagt finner De en oversikt over de foreslåtte endringene.
english: Attached you will find an overview of the proposed changes.

norwegian: Vi ___ oss å komme tilbake til Dem med et tilbud innen fredag.
english: We allow ourselves to come back to you with an offer by Friday.

norwegian: I henhold til møtereferat datert 15. mai, er følgende besluttet.
english: In accordance with the minutes dated May 15, the following has been decided.

norwegian: Jeg ___ foreslå at vi utsetter fristen med to uker.
english: I would like to suggest that we extend the deadline by two weeks.

norwegian: Med vennlig hilsen og ønske om et fortsatt godt samarbeid.
english: With kind regards and wishing continued good cooperation.

norwegian: Det vil være ___ om alle deltakerne kunne forberede et kort innlegg.
english: It would be appreciated if all participants could prepare a short presentation.

norwegian: Vi beklager eventuelle ulemper dette måtte medføre.
english: We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

norwegian: Sakslisten for morgendagens møte er som ___ .
english: The agenda for tomorrow's meeting is as follows.

norwegian: Undertegnede ber om at saken behandles så snart som mulig.
english: The undersigned requests that the matter be dealt with as soon as possible.
